projectDescription: A complete Material Design desktop shell for Wayland compositors, built with Quickshell and Go, featuring dynamic theming, a plugin system, and support for Niri, Hyprland, Sway, and more.
keyFeatures: Dynamic wallpaper-based theming with Material Design 3 colors via matugen
Complete desktop shell replacing waybar, swaylock, swayidle, mako, and fuzzel
Support for Niri, Hyprland, Sway, MangoWC, labwc, Scroll, and Miracle WM
Spotlight-style application launcher with file search, emoji, and calculator
Control Center with network, Bluetooth, audio, display, and night mode controls
Smart notification center with grouping and keyboard navigation
Plugin system with bar widgets, launcher extensions, and desktop widgets
One-command installer for Arch, Fedora, Debian, Ubuntu, openSUSE, and Gentoo
IPC interface for scripting and keybind integration
Native Wayland color picker, clipboard history, and screen lock
publicApiSurface: IPC target: audio (setvolume, increment, decrement, mute, status)
IPC target: brightness (set, increment, decrement, status, list)
IPC target: wallpaper (get, set, next, prev, setFor, getFor)
IPC target: theme (toggle, light, dark, getMode)
IPC target: spotlight (open, close, toggle, openQuery, toggleQuery)
IPC target: bar (reveal, hide, toggle, status)
IPC target: mpris (play, pause, playPause, next, previous, stop)
IPC target: night (toggle, enable, disable, temperature, automation, schedule)
IPC target: hypr (openOverview, closeOverview, toggleOverview, openBinds)
